title: From disaster to archaeology, teeth give away many secrets
description: Advanced dental imaging using CBCT scans can now estimate age with up to 96% accuracy, according to a study by Lt Col Dr Poonam Prakash. This non-invasive method, focusing on the pulp-to-tooth volume ratio in canines, offers reliable age determination for forensic, archaeological, and military identification purposes.

title: The Unique Tradition of Train Horns at Haridwar's Ancient Kali Temple
description: In Haridwar, Uttarakhand, a unique tradition persists where trains sound their horns as they pass beneath an ancient temple dedicated to Goddess Kali. This practice, believed to have originated during the British era, symbolizes respect for the goddess. A recent Instagram video by travel content creator Rishabh Sharma highlights this intriguing custom, showcasing how the temple's history intertwines with local beliefs. The video has garnered significant attention, with many devotees expressing their reverence in the comments. Discover the story behind this remarkable tradition and its significance to the local community.

title: From ancient vine to modern superfruit: The science behind grapes’ health renaissance

title: Indian scientists unlock ancient farming clues in pollen
description: A recent scientific study has shed fresh light on the origins and evolution of agriculture in India’s fertile Ganga Plain, using an unlikely but powerful tool—microscopic grass pollen grains. Researchers have developed a method to distinguish between pollen produced by wild grasses and that from cultivated crops, enabling them to reconstruct early farming patterns [...] The post Indian scientists unlock ancient farming clues in pollen appeared first on Good Bharat .

title: CM Dhami urges people to visit Bageshwar's ancient Dhaulinag Devta Temple
